message:
style(mux-server-impl): apply clippy lint fixes across crate

Address multiple clippy warnings: replace wildcard import (codec::*)
with explicit imports in sessionhandler, add missing semicolons on
discarded return values (~25 instances), remove unnecessary .into_iter()
calls on types already implementing IntoIterator, collapse else-if
blocks, flatten nested for/if-let with .flatten(), fix needless borrows
(&config -> config, &sock_path -> sock_path), use () in unit Ok
patterns, fix struct field order to match declaration, and qualify
codec::GetCodecVersion in test after wildcard removal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
